channel.title: Media on amardeepsidhu.com
channel.description: Recent content in Media on amardeepsidhu.com

item.title: Enter-marriage-tainment
item.description: Since evening, all the news channels on idiot box TV are talking about Rakhi ka Swayamvar. Anyways there is no fun in talking about the credibilioty of the news channels as since so long all of them have become money making businesses rather than what we call as “constructive journalism”. If we leave 2 or 3 English news channels, all others are in such a horrible condition that they need to be sent off air immediately. Now talking about so called entertainment, things like Rakhi ka Swayamvar are just crossing all the limits. Is marriage such kind of entertainment that it should be shown on the TV ? And how successful marriage arranged like this is going to be ? I just watched the TV for 10 minutes and was just wondering how big the arrangements are and parents of participants are also there. One lady saying to another “shayad aaj tum saasu maan ban-ne wali ho”… what the heck shayad ? The participants, their family members…man they all appear to be so stupid…waiting for all this.

item.title: Bloody hell
item.description: Well, a quick post to puke some frustration about these bloody reality shows on Indian TV channels. Let it be Sa Re Ga Ma, India idol or any a b c. I just don’t understand what the hell they are looking for ? See the judges, anchors and  contestants. Everybody is hell bent on uttering maximum possible non-sense. And the contestants, i guess they look for beautiful faces rather than beautiful voices. And those x y z non-sense things they are made to do in the show are just bloody irritating like anything. All the 24 hours they abuse music. And oh yes that people voting thing; what does that mean ? If people can vote and make someone enter back into the show, what the heck judges are for ?

item.title: SAJDA on Zee Punjabi
item.description:
piche je ik wari zee punjabi te ik show shuru hoya c…naa c SAJDA…kise ne kise mahaan shaksheeyat bare dikhaya janda c…fer shayad eh band ho gia c…aj main zee punjabi dekh riha c tan ohi program dubara dekhia…shayad dubara shuru ho gia hai…aj dikhaya gia kuldeep manak di life baare…

eh bahut hi mehnat naal banaya show lagda hai…anchor wadia punjabi bol riha c…filmanakan bahut sohne tareeke naal kita gia c…pinda de wich ja ke…jihde shahar di gal hundi utho da kuch dikhya janda c…kull mila ke bahut wadia cheez banai gai a…show sirf 30 min da hai…jo k mere khiyal ch ghat ne…1 ghanta te ghat ton ghat hona chahida hai….eh show shayad har sunday nu shaam nu 8:30 waje aaunda hai…shyad eh kade dubhara dikhaya janda hove par zee punjabi di website nahi chal rahi so main pakka nai kar sakia…

item.title: Punjabi sabhiachaar banam TV channels...
item.description:
main aj da spokesman pad riha c te uhde ch 2 article pade…punjabi sabhiachaar baare….bahut hi sohne likhe hoye…bhave paran nu bade kaure laggan par sach….so oh dono article main ethe post kar riha haan….

Comments

Comment by harmeet sidhu on 2008-04-20 21:14:24 +0530

yaar gurdas maan wale forum te.. main ikk forum shuru keeta hai.. kyu na aapa ikk jagah te ekathe hoyie.. ? nai taan pher panj-aab wale group wala haal ho jaana? tell me or i should come here and close that forum named lets save punjabi? harman told me so i started.. so there is way to link both?
